action.reasoning: Observation: v24 test crashed on TypeError (dict vs dict comparison for robot_collisions); max streak=35 safe steps (progress but <<500), detector triggers but loses lock quickly (avg_safe~15, avg_dist~5-6m), success=0. Config exact: 500 accum steps in [1.0,2.0)m + |angle|<0.2618rad. Earlier versions hit ~50-100 safe. Analysis: collision handling root cause of crash (metrics['robot_collisions'] is dict); follow stabilization imperfect (speed-match 0.23 + err causes drift/oscillation on random oracle ~0.25m/s human speed, OA interferes, pure-rotate threshold loose). Reactive heuristic is viable per literature (~0.5 follow-rate possible with tuning) but needs robust per-step safe counting, collision fix, tighter gains, better OA gating, human-speed base_vel=0.25 when aligned. Truncation in workspace files caused incomplete act()/loop. Decision: rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py with clean v25 HeuristicPolicy (follow on detector>0.05|dist<3.5, base_linear=0.25+0.12*err clipped[0.15,0.4], pure-rotate if |angle|>0.3, ang_k=-7.5, OA only if detector<0.25+min_front<0.85 w/ robust center/left/right depth slices+valid>0.02, backup<0.85, seek=0.8 when far, aligned vel reduction, per-step safe+streak+max_streak+detector+collisions inside loop using exact config angle+compass from post-step obs, fixed get_collision_delta helper for dict metrics, manual safe_follow_steps, full JSON contract+make_serializable+all required keys+metrics fallback for aggregates, abs paths+dataset override+concur_render=False, one Env context). Update train.py to save v25 ckpt. Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) for validation (target: avg_safe>50, max_streak>100 in good epis, first success>0).
